title: The Multiverse of Freddy's
description: An Ultimate Five Nights at Freddy's mod adding all of your favorite characters plus more!
body:
![Thingy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c4c565dad04388d6b4777d349412124e0e8aff.png)



# **If there are any bugs, suggestions, or wish to talk to us please join our Discord Server**
# 

## THE DISCORD: https://discord.gg/sXpwvsbqTm (We will be sharing teasers for the upcoming updates!)




!STRUCTURES & MOBS WILL SPAWN ONCE YOU FIND HENRY'S CANE IN THE PIZZA PLACE!
!USE THE CO-ORDINATES GIVEN BY THE NEWSPAPER!

The Multiverse of Freddy's 1.20.1 is a fleshed-out version of the old Multiverse of Freddy's Mod back in 1.16.5!

 

As of now the only available content are characters, decor, block, and items from...

 

FNaF 1
FNaF 2
FNaF 3
FNaF 4
SL
FFPS
UCN
Fazbear Frights
HW
SB
Tales From the Pizzaplex
 !Make sure to visit the Ball Pit!

Through the coming months more games and book content will be added.

 

WARNING

!!DO NOT MOVE AROUND FAZ-BAG WHEN IN USE!!

!!DOWNLOAD GECKO LIB!!
